introSection: Big Apple is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently travelling Belgium with showman Jean Schweig. It debuted with the 29 September 2023 Foire à 1 Euro fair in Huy, Belgium

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.

fullText:
Big Apple is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently travelling Belgium with showman Jean Schweig. It debuted with the 29 September 2023 Foire à 1 Euro fair in Huy, Belgium



Pink track and unpainted supports.

The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.
